series_metadata.series_title: Controlling Board and Emergency Controlling Board Request
series_metadata.series_description: The Controlling Board General Request seeks the approval of general and emergency expenditures for Capital Improvement Projects, purchases made without competitive selection, and transfer of Capital Improvement Funds.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: on Procurement I:/drive provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and
